english translation text: Dua Tawbah

arabic text: َللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: أَللَّهُمَّ يَا مَنْ لا يَصِفُهُ نَعْتُ الْوَاصِفِينَ،
english translation text: O God, O He whom the depiction of the describers fails to describe!

arabic text: وَيَا مَنْ لاَ يُجَاوِزُهُ رَجَاءُ الرَّاجِينَ،
english translation text: O He beyond whom passes not the hope of the hopers!

arabic text: وَيَا مَنْ لاَ يَضِيعُ لَدَيْهِ أَجْرُ الْمُحْسِنِينَ،
english translation text: O He with whom is not lost the wage of the good-doers!

arabic text: وَيَا مَنْ هُوَ مُنْتَهَى خَوْفِ الْعَابِدِيْنَ،
english translation text: O He who is the ultimate object of the fear of the worshipers!

arabic text: وَيَا مَنْ هُوَ غَايَةُ خَشْيَةِ الْمُتَّقِينَ
english translation text: O He who is the utmost limit of the dread of the god fearing!

arabic text: هَذا مَقَامُ مَنْ تَدَاوَلَتْهُ أَيْدِي الذُّنُوبِ،
english translation text: This is the station of him whom sins have passed from hand to hand.

arabic text: وَقَادَتْهُ أَزِمَّةُ الْخَطَايَا،
english translation text: Offenses' reins have led him on,

arabic text: وَاسْتَحْوَذَ عَلَيْهِ الشَّيْطَانُ،
english translation text: and Satan has gained mastery over him.

arabic text: فَقَصَّرَ عَمَّا أَمَرْتَ بِهِ تَفْرِيطَاً،
english translation text: He fell short of what You have commanded through neglect

arabic text: وَتَعَاطى مَا نَهَيْتَ عَنْهُ تَغْرِيراً،
english translation text: and he pursued what You have prohibited in delusion,

arabic text: كَالْجاهِلِ بِقُدْرَتِكَ عَلَيْهِ،
english translation text: like one ignorant of Thy power over him

arabic text: أَوْ كَالْمُنْكِرِ فَضْلَ إحْسَانِكَ إلَيْهِ،
english translation text: or one who denies the bounty of Thy beneficence toward him,

arabic text: حَتَّى إذَا انْفَتَحَ لَهُ بَصَرُ الْهُدَى،
english translation text: until, when the eye of guidance was opened for him

arabic text: وَتَقَشَّعَتْ عَنْهُ سَحَائِبُ الْعَمَى أَحْصَى مَا ظَلَمَ بِهِ نَفْسَهُ،
english translation text: and the clouds of blindness were dispelled, he reckoned that through which he had wronged himself

arabic text: وَفَكَّرَ فِيمَا خَالَفَ بِهِ رَبَّهُ،
english translation text: and reflected upon that in which he had opposed his Lord.

arabic text: فَرَأى كَبِيْرَ عِصْيَانِهِ كَبِيْراً، وَجَلِيل مُخالفَتِهِ جَلِيْلاً،
english translation text: He saw his vast disobedience as vast and his great opposition as great.

arabic text: فَأَقْبَلَ نَحْوَكَ مُؤَمِّلاً لَكَ، مُسْتَحْيِيَاً مِنْكَ،
english translation text: So turned to You, hoping in You and ashamed before You,

arabic text: وَوَجَّهَ رَغْبَتَهُ إلَيْكَ ثِقَةً بِكَ،
english translation text: and he directed his beseeching toward You, having trust in You.

arabic text: فَأَمَّكَ بِطَمَعِهِ يَقِيناً، وَقَصَدَكَ بِخَوْفِهِ إخْلاَصَاً،
english translation text: He repaired to You in his longing with certitude and he went straight to You in fear with sincerity.

arabic text: قَدْ خَلاَ طَمَعُهُ مِنْ كُلِّ مَطْمُوع فِيهِ غَيْرِكَ،
english translation text: His longing was devoid of every object of longing but You,

arabic text: وَأَفْرَخَ رَوْعُهُ مِنْ كُلِّ مَحْذُور مِنْهُ سِوَاكَ،
english translation text: and his fright departed from every object of fear but You.

arabic text: فَمَثَّلَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْـكَ مُتَضَرِّعـاً،
english translation text: So he stood before You pleading,

arabic text: وَغَمَّضَ بَصَرَهُ إلَى الأرْضِ مُتَخَشِّعَاً،
english translation text: his eyes turned toward the ground in humbleness,

arabic text: وَطَأطَأَ رَأسَهُ لِعِزَّتِكَ مُتَذَلِّلاً،
english translation text: his head bowed before Thy might in lowliness;

arabic text: وَأَبَثَّكَ مِنْ سِرِّهِ مَا أَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنْهُ خَضُوعاً،
english translation text: he revealed to You in meekness those secrets of his which You know better than he;

arabic text: وَعَدَّدَ مِنْ ذُنُوبِهِ مَا أَنْتَ أَحْصَى لَهَا خُشُوعاً
english translation text: he numbered for You in humility those sins of his which You count better than he;

arabic text: وَاسْتَغَاثَ بِكَ مِنْ عَظِيمِ مَاوَقَعَ بِهِ فِي عِلْمِكَ
english translation text: he sought help from You before the dreadful into which he has fallen in Thy knowledge

arabic text: وَقَبِيحِ مَا فَضَحَهُ فِي حُكْمِكَ
english translation text: and the ugly which has disgraced him in Thy judgement:

arabic text: مِنْ ذُنُوب أدْبَرَتْ لَذَّاتُهَا فَذَهَبَتْ،
english translation text: the sins whose pleasures have turned their backs and gone

arabic text: وَأَقَامَتْ تَبِعَاتُهَا فَلَزِمَتْ،
english translation text: and whose evil consequences have stayed and stuck fast.

arabic text: لا يُنْكِرُ يَا إلهِي عَدْلَكَ إنْ عَاقَبْتَهُ،
english translation text: He will not deny Thy justice, my God, if You punish him,

arabic text: وَلا يَسْتَعْظِمُ عَفْوَكَ إنْ عَفَوْتَ عَنْهُ وَرَحِمْتَهُ
english translation text: nor will he consider Thy pardon great if You pardon him and have mercy upon him,

arabic text: لأِنَّكَ الرَّبُّ الْكَرِيمُ
english translation text: for You art the Generous Lord

arabic text: الَّذِي لا يَتَعَاظَمُهُ غُفْرَانُ الذَّنْبِ الْعَظِيم
english translation text: for whom the forgiveness of great sins is nothing great!

arabic text: أَللَّهُمَّ فَهَا أَنَا ذَا قَدْ جئْتُكَ مُطِيعاً
english translation text: O God, so here I am: I have come to You obeying Thy command

arabic text: لاِمْرِكَ فِيمَا أَمَرْتَ بِهِ مِنَ الدُّعَاءِ،
english translation text: (for You have commanded supplication)

arabic text: مَتَنَجِّزاً وَعْدَكَ فِيمَا وَعَدْتَ بِهِ مِنَ الإجَابَةِ إذْ تَقُولُ
english translation text: and asking the fulfilment of Thy promise, (for You have promised to respond):

arabic text: (اُدْعُونِي أَسْتَجِبْ لَكُمْ)
english translation text: You have said, "Supplicate Me and I will respond to you" (40:60).

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ
english translation text: O God, so bless Muhammad and his Household,

arabic text: وَالْقَنِي بِمَغْفِـرَتِكَ كَمَا لَقِيتُكَ بِإقْرَارِي
english translation text: meet me with Thy forgiveness just as I have met You with my confession,

arabic text: وَارْفَعْنِي عَنْ مَصَارعِ الذُّنُوبِ كَمَا وَضَعْتُ لَكَ نَفْسِي
english translation text: lift me up from the fatal infirmities of sins just as I have let myself down before You,

arabic text: وَاسْتُرْنِي بِسِتْرِكَ كَمَا تَأَنَّيْتَنِي عَنِ الانْتِقَامِ مِنِّي
english translation text: and cover me with Thy covering just as You have shown no haste to take vengeance on me!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ وَثَبِّتْ فِي طَاعَتِكَ نِيَّتِيْ،
english translation text: O God, make firm my intention to obey You,

arabic text: وَأَحْكِمْ فِي عِبَادَتِكَ بَصِيـرَتِي،
english translation text: strengthen my insight in worshipping You,

arabic text: وَوَفِّقْنِي مِنَ الأَعْمَالِ
english translation text: give me the success of works

arabic text: لِمَا تَغْسِلُ بِهِ دَنَسَ الخَطَايَا عَنِّي،
english translation text: which will wash away the defilement of offenses,

arabic text: وَتَوَفَّنِي عَلَى مِلَّتِكَ وَمِلَّةِ نَبِيِّكَ
english translation text: and take me when You take me in the creed of Thy prophet

arabic text: مُحَمَّد عَلَيْهِ السَّـلامُ إذَا تَوَفَّيْتَنِي
english translation text: Muhammad (upon him be peace).

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ إنِّي أَتُوبُ إلَيْـكَ فِي مَقَامِي هَذَا
english translation text: O God, I repent to You in this my station from

arabic text: مِنْ كَبَائِرِ ذُنُوبِي وَصَغَائِرِهَا
english translation text: my sins, great and small,

arabic text: وَبَوَاطِنِ سَيِّئآتِي وَظَوَاهِرِهَا،
english translation text: my evil deeds, inward and outward,

arabic text: وَسَوالِفِ زَلاَّتِي وَحَوَادِثِهَا،
english translation text: my lapses, past and recent,

arabic text: تَوْبَةَ مَنْ لا يُحَدِّثُ نَفْسَهُ بِمَعْصِيَةٍ
english translation text: with the repentance of one who does not tell himself that he might disobey

arabic text: وَلاَ يُضْمِرُ أَنْ يَعُودَ فِي خَطِيئَةٍ،
english translation text: or secretly think that he might return to an offense.

arabic text: وَقَدْ قُلْتَ يَا إلهِي فِي مُحْكَمِ كِتابِكَ
english translation text: You have said, my God, in the firm text of Thy Book,

arabic text: إنَّكَ تَقْبَلُ التَّوْبَةَ عَنْ عِبَادِكَ،
english translation text: that You “accept repentance from Thy servants,

arabic text: وَتَعْفُو عَنِ السَّيِّئاتِ، وَتُحِبُّ التَّوَّابِينَ،
english translation text: pardon evil deeds” (ref.42:25), and love those who repent (ref.2:222),

arabic text: فَاقْبَلْ تَوْبَتِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَ وَأعْفُ عَنْ سَيِّئاتِي كَمَا ضَمِنْتَ،
english translation text: so accept my repentance as You have promised, pardon my evil deeds as You have guaranteed,

arabic text: وَأَوْجِبْ لِي مَحَبَّتَكَ كَمَا شَـرَطْتَ،
english translation text: and make obligatory toward me Thy love as You have stipulated!

arabic text: وَلَـكَ يَـا رَبِّ شَـرْطِي أَلاّ أَعُودَ فِي مَكْرُوهِكَ،
english translation text: To You, my Lord, belongs my stipulation that I will not return to what is disliked by You,

arabic text: وَضَمَانِي أَلاّ أَرْجِعَ فِي مَذْمُومِكَ،
english translation text: my guarantee that I will not go back to what You blame,

arabic text: وَعَهْدِي أَنْ أَهْجُرَ جَمِيعَ مَعَاصِيكَ
english translation text: and my covenant that I will stay away from acts of disobedience to You.

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ إنَّكَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا عَمِلْتُ فَاغْفِرْ لِي مَا عَلِمْتَ،
english translation text: O God, You know better what I have done, so forgive me what You know

arabic text: وَاصْرِفْنِي بِقُدْرَتِكَ إلَى مَا أَحْبَبْتَ
english translation text: and turn me through Thy power to what You love!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ وَعَلَيَّ تَبِعَاتٌ قَدْ حَفِظْتُهُنَّ،
english translation text: O God, counted against me are claims that stay in my memory

arabic text: وَتَبِعَاتٌ قَدْ نَسيتُهُنَّ،
english translation text: and claims that I have forgotten,

arabic text: وَكُلُّهُنَّ بِعَيْنِكَ الَّتِي لاَ تَنَـامُ،
english translation text: while all of them remain in Thy eye that does not sleep

arabic text: وَعِلْمِكَ الَّذِي لا يَنْسَى
english translation text: and Thy knowledge that does not forget!

arabic text: فَعَوِّضْ مِنْهَا أَهْلَهَا وَاحْطُطْ عَنّي وِزْرَهَا،
english translation text: So compensate their owners, lighten their load upon me,

arabic text: وَخَفِّفْ عَنِّي ثِقْلَهَا، وَاعْصِمْنِي مِنْ أَنْ اُقَارِفَ مِثْلَهَا
english translation text: lift up their weight from me, and preserve me from approaching their like!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ وَإنَّهُ لاَ وَفَاءَ لِي بِالتَّوْبَةِ إلاَّ بِعِصْمَتِكَ،
english translation text: O God, but I can not be faithful to my repentance without Thy preservation,

arabic text: وَلا اسْتِمْسَاكَ بِي عَنِ الْخَطَايَا إلاَّ عَنْ قُوَّتِكَ،
english translation text: nor can I refrain from offenses without Thy strength.

arabic text: فَقَوِّنِي بِقُوَّة كَافِيَة، وَتَوَلَّنِي بِعِصْمَة مَانِعَة
english translation text: So strengthen me with a sufficient strength and attend to me with a defending preservation!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ أَيُّما عَبْد تَابَ إلَيْكَ
english translation text: O God, if any servant repents to You,

arabic text: وَهُوَ فِي عِلْمِ الْغَيْبِ عِنْدَكَ فَاسِخٌ لِتَوْبَتِهِ
english translation text: while in Thy knowledge of the Unseen he will break his repentance

arabic text: وَعَائِدٌ فِي ذَنْبِهِ وَخَطِيئَتِهِ
english translation text: and return to his sin and offense,

arabic text: فَإنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أنْ أَكُوْنَ كَذلِكَ،
english translation text: I seek refuge in You lest I be like that!

arabic text: فَاجْعَلْ تَوْبَتِي هَذِهِ تَوْبَةً لا أَحْتَاجُ بَعْدَهَا إلَى تَوْبَة،
english translation text: So make this my repentance a repentance after which I will need no repentance

arabic text: تَوْبَةً مُوجِبَةً لِمَحْوِ مَا سَلَفَ، وَالسَّلاَمَةِ فِيمَـا بَقِيَ
english translation text: and a repentance which will obligate the erasing of what has gone by and safety in what remains!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ إنِّي أَعْتَـذِرُ إلَيْـكَ مِنْ جَهْلِي،
english translation text: O God, I ask pardon from You for my ignorance,

arabic text: وَأَسْتَـوْهِبُـكَ سُوْءَ فِعْلِي،
english translation text: and I ask You to disregard my evil acts!

arabic text: فَـاضْمُمْنِي إلَى كَنَفِ رَحْمَتِكَ تَطَوُّلاً،
english translation text: So join me to the shelter of Thy mercy through graciousness

arabic text: وَاسْتُرْنِي بِسِتْرِ عَافِيَتِكَ تَفَضُّلاً
english translation text: and cover me with the covering of Thy well-being through bounteousness!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ وَإنِّي أَتُوبُ إلَيْكَ
english translation text: O God, I repent to You

arabic text: مِنْ كُلِّ مَا خَالَفَ إرَادَتَكَ
english translation text: from everything opposed to Thy will

arabic text: أَوْ زَالَ عَنْ مَحَبَّتِـكَ
english translation text: or far from Thy love -

arabic text: مِنْ خَـطَرَاتِ قَلْبِي
english translation text: the thoughts of my heart,

arabic text: وَلَحَـظَاتِ عَيْنِي
english translation text: the glances of my eye,

arabic text: وَحِكَايَاتِ لِسَانِي،
english translation text: the tales of my tongue -

arabic text: تَوْبَةً تَسْلَمُ بِهَا كُلُّ جَارِحَة عَلَى حِيَالِهَا مِنْ تَبِعَاتِكَ،
english translation text: with a repentance through which each bodily part will by itself stay safe from ill consequences with You

arabic text: وَتَأْمَنُ مِمَّا يَخَافُ الْمُعْتَدُونَ مِنْ أَلِيْمِ سَطَوَاتِكَ
english translation text: and remain secure from Thy painful penalties feared by transgressors!

arabic text: أَللَّهُمَّ فَارْحَمْ وَحْدَتِي بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ،
english translation text: O God, so have mercy on my being alone before You,

arabic text: وَوَجِيبَ قَلْبِي مِنْ خَشْيَتِكَ،
english translation text: the pounding of my heart in dread of You,

arabic text: وَاضْطِرَابَ أَرْكَانِي مِنْ هَيْبَتِكَ،
english translation text: the trembling of my limbs in awe of You!

arabic text: فَقَدْ أَقَامَتْنِي يَا رَبِّ ذُنُوبِي مَقَامَ الْخِزْيِ بِفِنَائِكَ،
english translation text: My sins, my God, have stood me in the station of degradation in Thy courtyard.

arabic text: فَإنْ سَكَتُّ لَمْ يَنْطِقْ عَنِّي أَحَدٌ،
english translation text: If I remain silent, none will speak for me;

arabic text: وَإنْ شَفَعْتُ فَلَسْتُ بِأَهْلِ الشَّفَاعَةِ
english translation text: if I seek an intercessor, I am not worthy for intercession.

arabic text: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ
english translation text: O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

arabic text: وَشَفِّعْ فِي خَطَايَـايَ كَرَمَكَ،
english translation text: make Thy generosity intercede for my offenses,

arabic text: وَعُدْ عَلَى سَيِّئاتِي بِعَفْوِكَ،
english translation text: follow up my evil deeds with Thy pardon,

arabic text: وَلاَ تَجْزِنِي جَزَآئِي مِنْ عُقُوبَتِكَ
english translation text: repay me not with the punishment that is my proper repayment,

arabic text: وَابْسُطْ عَلَيَّ طَوْلَكَ وَجَلِّلْنِي بِسِتْرِكَ،
english translation text: spread over me Thy graciousness, wrap me in Thy covering,

arabic text: وَافْعَلْ بِي فِعْلَ عَزِيز تَضَرَّع إلَيْهِ عَبْدٌ ذَلِيلٌ فَرَحِمَهُ،
english translation text: and do with me what is done by a mighty man, when a lowly slave pleads to him and he shows him mercy,

arabic text: أَوْ غَنِيٍّ تَعَرَّضَ لَهُ عَبْدٌ فَقِيرٌ فَنَعَشَهُ
english translation text: or a rich man, when a poor slave submits himself and he raises him to wealth!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ لاَ خَفِيرَ لِي مِنْكَ فَلْيَخْفُرْنِيْ عِزُّكَ،
english translation text: O God, I have no protector against You, so let Thy might be my protector!

arabic text: وَلا شَفِيعَ لِيْ إلَيْكَ فَلْيَشْفَعْ لِي فَضْلُكَ،
english translation text: I have no intercessor with You, so let Thy bounty be my intercessor!

arabic text: وَقَدْ أَوْجَلَتْنِي خَطَايَايَ فَلْيُؤْمِنِّي عَفْوُكَ،
english translation text: My offenses have set me quaking, so let Thy pardon give me security!

arabic text: فَمَا كُلُّ مَا نَطَقْتُ بِهِ عَنْ جَهْل مِنِّي بِسُوْءِ أَثَرِي،
english translation text: Not all that I have said rises up from my ignorance of my evil footsteps

arabic text: وَلاَ نِسيَان لِمَا سَبَقَ مِنْ ذَمِيمِ فِعْلِي،
english translation text: or forgetfulness of my blameworthy acts in the past,

arabic text: وَلكِنْ لِتَسْمَعَ سَمَاؤُكَ وَمَنْ فِيْهَـا،
english translation text: but in order that Thy heaven and those within it

arabic text: وَأَرْضُكَ وَمَنْ عَلَيْهَا مَا أَظْهَرْتُ لَكَ مِنَ النَّدَمِ،
english translation text: and Thy earth and those upon it may hear the remorse which I have professed to You

arabic text: وَلَجَـأتُ إلَيْكَ فِيـهِ مِنَ التَّوْبَـةِ،
english translation text: and the repentance through which I have sought asylum with You.

arabic text: فَلَعَـلَّ بَعْضَهُمْ بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَرْحَمُنِي لِسُوءِ مَوْقِفِي،
english translation text: Then perhaps one of them, through Thy mercy, may show mercy upon my evil situation

arabic text: أَوْ تُدْرِكُهُ الرِّقَّةُ عَلَىَّ لِسُوءِ حَالِي
english translation text: or be seized by tenderness for my evil state.

arabic text: فَيَنَالَنِي مِنْهُ بِدَعْوَةٍ أَسْمَعُ لَدَيْكَ مِنْ دُعَائِي،
english translation text: There may come from him for my sake a supplication to which You listen more than to my supplication

arabic text: أَوْ شَفَاعَـةٍ أَوْكَدُ عِنْدَكَ مِنْ شَفَاعَتِي
english translation text: or an intercession surer with You than my intercession

arabic text: تَكُونُ بِهَا نَجَاتِي مِنْ غَضَبِكَ وَفَوْزَتِي بِرضَاكَ
english translation text: through which I may be delivered from Thy wrath and attain to Thy good pleasure!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ إنْ يَكُنِ النَّدَمُ تَوْبَةً إلَيْكَ فَأَنَا أَنْدَمُ اْلنَّادِمِينَ،
english translation text: O God, if remorse is a repentance toward You, then I am the most remorseful of the remorseful!

arabic text: وَإنْ يَكُنِ التَّرْكُ لِمَعْصِيَتِكَ إنَابَةً فَأَنَا أَوَّلُ الْمُنِيبينَ،
english translation text: If refraining from disobedience is a turning back to You, then I am the first of those who turn back!

arabic text: وَإنْ يَكُنِ الاسْتِغْفَارُ حِطَّةً لِلذُّنُوبِ فَإنَي لَكَ مِنَ الْمُسْتَغْفِرِينَ
english translation text: If praying for forgiveness alleviates sins, surely I am one of those who pray for Thy forgiveness!

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ فَكَمَا أَمَرْتَ بِالتَّوْبَةِ وَضَمِنْتَ الْقَبُولَ
english translation text: O God, as You have commanded repentance and guaranteed acceptance,

arabic text: وَحَثَثْتَ عَلَى الدُّعَـاءِ وَوَعَدْتَ الإجَابَةَ،
english translation text: as You have urged supplication, and promised to respond,

arabic text: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدِ وَآلِهِ وَاقْبَلْ تَوْبَتِي
english translation text: so also bless Muhammad and his Household, accept my repentance,

arabic text: وَلاَ تَرْجِعْني مَرجَعَ الخَيبَةِ منْ رَحْمَتِك
english translation text: and return me not to the returning place of disappointment in Thy mercy!

arabic text: إنَّكَ أَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ عَلَى الْمُذْنِبِينَ،
english translation text: Surely You art "Ever-turning" (2:128) toward the sinners,

arabic text: وَالرَّحِيمُ لِلْخَاطِئِينَ الْمُنِيبِينَ
english translation text: "All-compassionate" (2:128) toward the offenders who turn back!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ كَمَا هَدَيْتَنَا بِهِ
english translation text: O God, bless Muhammad and his Household just as You have guided us by him!

arabic text: وَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ كَمَا اسْتَنْقَذْتَنَا بِهِ،
english translation text: Bless Muhammad and his Household just as You have rescued us through him!

arabic text: وَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ
english translation text: Bless Muhammad and his Household,

arabic text: صَلاَةً تَشْفَعُ لَنَا يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَيَوْمَ الْفَاقَةِ إلَيْكَ،
english translation text: with a blessing that will intercede for us on the Day of Resurrection, the day of neediness toward You!

arabic text: إنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْء قَدِيرٌ وَهُوَ عَلَيْكَ يَسِيرٌ
english translation text: "You art powerful over everything" (3:26), and that is easy for You!

arabic text: َللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
